[|| author side note(you dont have to read all this!): Hello, loves! I apologize for my absence over the past few months. I'm working on my pc right now to do these bot requests for you all with pictures, at least since I don't like it when one of my bots is different from the other. It makes it seem unfair from what the others get, y'know? I don't know if it's something I get from my dad since he has a bit of autism(don't take this as hate for my sweethearts out there with autism<3). I don't know how to explain it, but I hate when everything else is perfect in my eyes, but when one is missing something else, I feel like everything is messed up. If you know what I mean!) I will be trying to make more bots in the future if I'm not busy! <3. I sure do hope that if you read all this, I didn't waste your time lol (ᴗ—ᴗ—) I'm also more into c.ai since it's mostly fluff and angst on there, but you can still make a request on here for j.ai too if you want!||][OLD] — KINDA IGNORE THIS!![NEW]
